U 14017/2/2009-^ 31^-111] •Si +¥IHk fH5, tl^M •Hfacl MINISTRY OF HOME AFFAIRS CORRIGENDA •s, New Delhi, the 5th March, 2010 S.O. 543(E)—In the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Home Affairs No. S.O. 260(E), dated 5th February, 2010, published at pages 3 and 4 in Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii) dated the 5th February, 2010, at page 4, in column 1,— (i) in line 23, for "UAP Act, 1969", read "the Act"; (ii) in line 29, for "UAP Act, 1969", read "the Act".
